# Agent Assignments: Feature 060 — Professional PDF Security Assessment Report

**Generated by**: team-lead
**Date**: 2026-03-29
**Feasibility**: APPROVED
**Total Tasks**: 45 | **Parallel**: 16 | **Sessions**: 2-3 (realistic: 2.5)

---

## Agent Assignment Matrix

### Agents Involved

| Agent | Role | Task Count | Load % | Rationale |
|-------|------|-----------|--------|-----------|
| `senior-backend-engineer` | Primary implementer | 33 | 73% | All deliverables are Typst templates, YAML schemas, and markdown agent instructions. Closest expertise match for markup/templating work. Carries PRD-054 context. |
| `tester` | Verification lead | 7 | 16% | Verification tasks at phase boundaries and cross-artifact combination testing. Separation of concerns from implementer. |
| `code-reviewer` | Compliance auditor | 3 | 7% | Brand token audit (SC-001), theme propagation test (SC-005), final compliance review. |
| `security-analyst` | PII/content scan | 2 | 4% | Brand asset content review, report-config.typ credential scan. Lightweight — template-only project. |

**Note**: No `frontend-developer`, `devops`, `ux-ui-designer`, or `web-researcher` agents needed. This is a template-only project with no application code, no deployment, and no UI components.

## Quality Gates Summary

| Gate | After Wave | Validates | Blocker? |
|------|-----------|-----------|----------|
| QG1: Foundation | Wave 1 | Theme tokens, heading migration, no regression | YES — blocks all subsequent waves |
| QG2: New Pages | Wave 2 | 4 new pages render, TOC accurate, brand integration | YES — blocks Wave 3 |
| QG3: Integration | Wave 3 | End-to-end pipeline, report-data.typ complete | YES — blocks Wave 4 |
| QG4: Config+Findings | Wave 4 | Configuration overrides, findings display | NO — Wave 5 can proceed |
| QG5: Final | Wave 5 | All SC-001 through SC-007 | YES — feature complete gate |

---

## Orchestrator Notes

1. **T010 risk**: Phantom heading technique (`hide()` + `outline()`) may not work in all Typst versions. If it fails, use the fallback from plan.md Component 2 (metadata/state approach). Do not block the phase.

2. **T016 complexity**: Methodology template is the densest single task (5x5 visual matrix, STRIDE explanation, AI categories, 2 conditional sections). Allocate extra time relative to T012/T013/T017.

3. **T036 unconditional**: Even if US6 cards are cut (T035 skipped), T036 (branded table headers) should execute to provide the minimum branded enhancement to findings-detail.typ.

4. **main.typ serialization**: T014, T018, T022 all modify main.typ. Execute sequentially within their respective lanes. Do not attempt to parallelize these.

5. **Phase 4 is the critical lane**: At 40 min, Lane B (Methodology+Scope) is the longest of the 3 parallel lanes in Wave 2. Lanes A and C will finish first.

---

**End of Agent Assignments**
